# #12 standard-sampler bytecode fixture — SINGLE SOURCE for the
# cross-language byte-parity guard. Emitted by foxtrot's SDK:
#   standard_programs(V)           -> the 4 k-invariant kinds (EXACT form)
#   standard_programs_canonical(V) -> top_k / top_k_top_p (CANONICAL op-shape:
#                                     the RankLe(k) immediate zeroed → k-invariant)
#
# Format: kind,vocab,fnv1a64,hex
#   fnv1a64 = pie_sampling_ir::program_hash(bytecode) == driver jit::fnv1a64.
# Recognizer use: argmax/temperature/min_p/top_p match by EXACT hash; the
# top_k/top_k_top_p rows are the CANONICAL form — the driver canonicalizes an
# incoming program (zero RankLe) then hashes, matching these for ANY k.
# Regenerate: STDPROG_FIXTURE_REGEN=1 cargo test -p sampling-edsl --test fixture
